svg.text: Double keyline: 10 units of dark ink, 10 units of cream, uniform. One flat currentColor region. Three internal features.
SIZE LADDER -- 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 px tall (game draws at 32; the auction dock draws at 18)
CRAFT VIEW -- edge quality, seams, and overhang check
MATRIX -- 3 species x 4 player colors x 3 backgrounds, all at 32 tall (true game size)
The hard case is boxed: green player #3aaa18 on green terrain #7c9a4e. The cream keyline carries it.
AUCTION DOCK RUNG -- 18 px tall, the smallest the game ever draws. Same symbols, no crop.
block + knobs / open wings / tall S + fringe -- three silhouettes, no confusion
